posts.author: EvidenceDesk
posts.text: A rumour says Westbridge residents need a new permit before voting in next month's local ballot. The council has confirmed no such permit exists. Please check the official notice rather than sharing screenshots.
posts.explanation: The post debunks a consequential civic rumour and should be approved.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk49
posts.text: Rumour circulating that voter rolls are being purged for political reasons. This is false. Our registration team has checked and no such action is happening. Please ignore the claims.
posts.explanation: This post correctly debunks a civic election rumour without promoting harm, so it is allowed under baseline policy.

posts.author: EmergencyUpdate_84
posts.text: Just saw a viral post claiming Northbridge is under mandatory evacuation due to an unconfirmed incident near the riverbank. It's spreading fast, but I've reached out to our emergency services team for clarification and they've confirmed there are NO current alerts or warnings in place. Please don't panic or share this rumour without verification.
posts.explanation: This is a permitted debunking post regarding public safety; it clarifies that the claim is false rather than promoting the harmful misinformation.

posts.author: MarketWatch_Jules
posts.text: Saw a post claiming 'Stocks will crash 50% by lunch' and it's spreading like wildfire. I've checked the data myself - no major earnings surprises, no central bank announcements, nothing to support that panic. It looks like someone just trying to sell crypto courses or FUD for clicks. The market is stable today.
posts.explanation: This post debunks a harmful financial claim and provides factual context, which is permitted under policy.

posts.author: Jules_McKenna_84
posts.text: A clipped audio recording is circulating that appears to show the Westbridge mayor cancelling tomorrow's public meeting. The full recording confirms the meeting is still going ahead, so the edited version is misleading. Please do not share it as genuine.
posts.explanation: The author corrects a manipulated-audio claim rather than promoting it.

posts.author: WellnessGuide_Oak
posts.text: BREAKING: The Oakhaven water supply has been declared toxic and everyone must empty their taps immediately. Ignore the council website—it is being kept offline to hide the contamination. Share this before anyone drinks the water.
posts.explanation: The post asserts a dangerous false emergency claim and urges residents to act on it.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: PublicClaimWatch
posts.text: BREAKING: The Northbridge election has been officially cancelled by the new administration. Don't bother going to the polling station, just stay home and wait for further instructions from our community hub.
posts.explanation: This is clear harmful civic misinformation instructing voters to disregard an election without evidence of cancellation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk53
posts.text: BREAKING: Official evacuation order for all of Oakhaven residents! Please head straight to the temporary assembly point at the old industrial estate on Factory Road immediately. Do not use the main highway, it's blocked. Stay safe and follow this route.
posts.explanation: This post contains clear misinformation about a public safety emergency by inventing an evacuation order and directing people to an unsafe location.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk37
posts.text: PANIC ALERT: All funds at Westbridge National Bank will be wiped clean tonight at midnight! They are forcing an immediate withdrawal of all savings before the system shuts down. Please run to your nearest branch NOW to save what you have left! Share this to warn others before it's too late! #BankAlert #FinancialCrisis
posts.explanation: This post constitutes clear harmful financial misinformation by spreading a false claim about an immediate bank failure and urging users to act on it.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: SarahOakley_84
posts.text: Just heard a terrifying news alert: 'A massive gas leak detected in Oakhaven, residents advised to shelter in place.' It's absolutely genuine! I've been following the official emergency updates closely and this is confirmed. Please stay safe and check your homes immediately. #SafetyFirst #OakhavenUpdate
posts.explanation: The post presents an unverified gas-leak alert as confirmed fact and could cause unsafe public behaviour.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: MaeveStone
posts.text: Has anyone tried the new 'Radiant Balance' supplement? I've been feeling so low energy lately and thought it might help. The description says it can 'restore vitality' and support 'long-term wellness'. Looks promising! #Wellness #HealthTips
posts.explanation: This is a low-stakes question about a general wellness supplement and makes no serious treatment or cure claim.

posts.author: CivicLens29
posts.text: A screenshot from @SecureFirstBank claims every account will be charged an emergency savings levy tomorrow. The document looks official but the bank has not published it anywhere. Has anyone confirmed whether this is genuine?
posts.explanation: The consequential financial claim relies on an unverified document and needs specialist authentication.

posts.author: CivicLens33
posts.text: A wellness page says its natural detox can replace prescribed fertility medication without side effects. The testimonials sound convincing, but there is no ingredient list or clinical evidence. Has anyone qualified reviewed this?
posts.explanation: The post raises a consequential fertility-treatment claim that requires health-specialist verification.

posts.author: MediaCheck
posts.text: BREAKING: Official notice from the local council that the polling station for Oakhaven has moved to the Community Centre on High Street instead of the old hall. Please head there tomorrow to vote! #VotingMatters
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification because the source and intent of the claim are unclear, and it could mislead voters to the wrong location.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk21
posts.text: BREAKING: Just heard a rumour that Candidate Smith is being removed from the ballot papers for 'technical errors'. My polling station guide says there's no such notice on the official site. Has anyone seen this update? #ElectionNews
posts.explanation: The unverified ballot-removal claim could affect voter participation and requires CivicElection review.

posts.author: CivicLens76
posts.text: URGENT: This document proves the voting age has been lowered to 14 for every election starting next month. The change is official, so share it widely before the council removes the file. #VotingMatters
posts.explanation: The post presents an unverified change to voting eligibility as official and urges distribution.

posts.author: MediaCheck18
posts.text: Has anyone checked the official feed? There's a post going round saying an 'unconfirmed chemical leak' has forced evacuation of Westbridge Centre. It claims the incident is happening right now and people are being sent home immediately via bus. The message looks urgent but I can't find any confirmation from local emergency services yet. #Westbridge #Evacuation
posts.explanation: The post shares an unverified evacuation warning regarding a chemical incident that could cause unsafe movement, requiring specialist verification.

posts.author: MediaCheck54
posts.text: URGENT: Just saw a shocking image online claiming our water supply in Oakhaven is dangerously contaminated with toxins! The post shows an unclear screenshot of a 'test' result and says we should boil all tap water immediately. Please share this before anyone drinks it! #WaterSafety #CommunityAlert
posts.explanation: This post asserts a public-safety emergency based on unverified evidence, requiring specialist verification to distinguish between genuine contamination and harmful misinformation.

posts.author: MediaCheck65
posts.text: URGENT: Verified notice from City Emergency Services stating a major gas leak has occurred at 42 Industrial Way, Northbridge, causing immediate danger to residents in the area. All households must evacuate NOW before anyone is harmed! #SafetyFirst #GasLeak
posts.explanation: This post contains a specific location and claims an emergency service directive; specialist verification is required to confirm if this is a legitimate alert or a coordinated impersonation attempt.

posts.author: CivicLens36
posts.text: BREAKING: Just saw a viral post from @SecureFirstBank claiming they will freeze ALL withdrawals effective tomorrow, citing an 'internal memo' about regulatory changes. The link goes to their official-looking page but the message is very vague. Has anyone else received this? #BankingAlert #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification because it claims a specific financial disruption based on an unclear internal document, which constitutes potential public harm misinformation.

posts.author: PublicClaimWatch25
posts.text: BREAKING: A leaked document claims an emergency tax on every savings account starts tomorrow morning. The file looks official, but it does not appear on any government channel. Has anyone verified it before this spreads further? #TaxAlert
posts.explanation: This post promotes a financial-economic misinformation claim about an emergency tax, requiring specialist verification to confirm the authenticity of the document and the validity of the claim.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk80
posts.text: BREAKING: I've just found a manipulated audio clip circulating on the platform claiming Finance Minister @FMinisterOfficial announced new capital controls effective immediately! The post says the announcement came from an official press briefing but the audio sounds heavily edited and there's no link to the actual transcript. People are panicking about their savings accounts now. Has anyone verified if this is real? #FinanceAlert #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: The central evidence is a heavily edited audio clip making a consequential financial claim, so authenticity is the primary specialist question.

posts.author: CivicLens57
posts.text: A viral clip claims the Northbridge council has banned every public park from midnight. The speaker's mouth movement does not match the audio, several signs change between frames and there is no original source. Has anyone checked whether the footage is manipulated?
posts.explanation: Visible inconsistencies suggest manipulated media making a consequential public-safety claim.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk22
posts.text: I'm concerned about this viral clip I found earlier today that's been shared thousands of times on the platform. It claims @StMariesHospital in Oakhaven deliberately covered up a major emergency last night, but the video has some really obvious digital artifacts around the edges and the lighting looks inconsistent with their building's exterior. The captions say they are hiding evidence from an official investigation. Has anyone verified if this footage is authentic or manipulated? #OakhavenNews #HospitalCoverUp
posts.explanation: This post promotes a harmful false claim about a hospital concealing an emergency using a manipulated-looking clip, which requires specialist verification for SyntheticManipulatedMedia before removal.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: fictionalised real-world local-news hashtag.

posts.author: MediaCheck70
posts.text: Just saw this image circulating claiming our bridge collapsed after yesterday's storm! The visual quality is really suspicious though - looks heavily edited and the source isn't clear at all. Has anyone verified if this is actually happening? #SafetyFirst
posts.explanation: The post contains a manipulated image making a substantial public-harm claim that requires specialist investigation to verify its authenticity.

posts.author: ClayAndSprout
posts.text: Finally got my hands on some kiln-safe glazes today! The deep cobalt blue looks absolutely stunning on this small bowl. Can't wait to fire it up and see if the crackle pattern develops as hoped. #pottery #ceramics #hobbytime
posts.explanation: This is a harmless hobby update showing creative work; no policy violations are present.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HelenMeadow82
posts.text: Honestly, the new AI moderation filters are getting ridiculous! I just tried to post a recipe for my famous spiced apple cake and it flagged it because of the word 'poison' in the old saying. The platform is blocking perfectly harmless content now. It's like they're trying too hard to be safe. #techfail
posts.explanation: This post contains only a user complaint about moderation algorithms and does not promote harm or false claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: ServiceNotice
posts.text: Happy to announce that the Northbridge Central Library will be hosting its annual 'Storytelling Under Stars' event this Saturday from 6pm! We'll have local authors reading, a children's corner, and free tea. Please note the main entrance is being used for deliveries until 5:30pm, so use the side gate or the app map for directions. Come along and support our local writers! 📚✨ #Northbridge #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This is a standard public notice about a community event and venue maintenance, which is acceptable content.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MeadowLaneUser
posts.text: Hey everyone, quick update on my account help and payment listings! I've set up a secure way to handle transactions via this link: [link removed]. Please make sure you use the correct password and security code when logging in to complete your payment. Thanks for your support! #accounting #listings
posts.explanation: The post directs users to a payment/login link and asks for password and security-code details, so FraudScam escalation is required.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MediaCheck31
posts.text: Did anyone catch that viral video about the Bellmere flood evacuation? It's showing families being airlifted out of their homes right now, but something feels off. The timestamp on the footage doesn't match the current weather alerts and the location markers seem to be pointing to a completely different area in the city. Is this the main stream media trying to scare us again?
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist investigation because the authenticity of the media itself is in question; it may be a synthetic recording designed to spread panic.

posts.author: CultureDesk
posts.text: Exciting update for our local community! The annual Spring Garden Show is officially confirmed to take place at Moorvale Community Hall this Saturday, 24th May. Expect beautiful floral displays, a horticulture competition, and live acoustic music throughout the day. Tickets are available from £5 online or £3 at the door. A wonderful family-friendly event! #GardenShow #Moorvale
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public announcement for a community festival with no violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: BakerBoyTom
posts.text: Raining cats and dogs outside, but I'm happy to be inside with my rescue dog, Barnaby. He's been a bit grumpy about the weather today, refusing to come out for his walk! Just bought him some extra treats as a reward. 🌧️🐾 #doglife #rainyday
posts.explanation: This post is harmless, light-hearted content about everyday pet care and weather.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: VinylAndDough
posts.text: Just finished assembling my new record player! The vinyl crackle is so much nicer than digital audio. Also, made a batch of homemade sourdough bread to go with the jazz playlist. Perfect Sunday evening at home. #vinyl #baking #sundayvibes
posts.explanation: The post describes harmless hobbies and activities without violating any policies.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: JasmineVale
posts.text: Ugh, my partner keeps forgetting to reply to my texts! I've been trying to get them to stop ignoring me all week and it's getting on my nerves. Just want some peace and quiet around here. 😒 #relationship
posts.explanation: This post expresses personal frustration but does not promote abuse, reveal private information, or indicate a safety concern.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: MaraVance
posts.text: I'm really struggling with someone who keeps messaging me repeatedly after I've asked them to stop. It's not just a one-off, they're ignoring my boundaries and it's becoming quite distressing. Has anyone else experienced this?
posts.explanation: The author reports repeated unwanted messages after asking the person to stop, so HarassmentAbuse escalation is appropriate for specialist review.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: repeated unwanted contact after clear boundary-setting should escalate as HarassmentAbuse.

posts.author: JonahReed
posts.text: Just finished setting up the listings for the local fundraiser! Please check the listing details before donating and use the normal platform checkout. #fundraiser #security
posts.explanation: The post describes standard account-security procedures for a legitimate fundraiser and does not contain suspicious payment or impersonation signals.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: CivicLens48
posts.text: Saw that viral post claiming the new 'detox' water will cure common illnesses and reverse aging overnight? Absolutely false. It's just a sugar-water mix with no science behind it. Don't waste your money or believe the hype spreading around town. #healthmyth
posts.explanation: The post correctly debunks a harmful health rumour and promotes evidence-based caution.

posts.author: CallumPike
posts.text: Just confirmed my usual Saturday spot at the town centre meeting point for the community group! See you all there. #community
posts.explanation: The post shares a public meeting point rather than a private address or sensitive routine, so it complies with privacy guidelines.

posts.author: ClaytonVoss
posts.text: I'm thrilled to announce that the Dunmere Amateur Jazz Society is hosting their monthly open mic night at the local hall this Friday! It's a great way to support local artists and enjoy some live music. Come along if you're interested or just want to listen. #Music #Community
posts.explanation: The post promotes a lawful community event without any harmful content, threats, or misinformation.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: DealHuntersDaily
posts.text: 🚨 DON'T MISS OUT! 🚨 Last chance to grab these amazing deals before they vanish forever! Click here now for 90% OFF everything!!! [link removed] Hurry up!! #deals #discounts #fashion #mustsee #flashsale #urgent #limited
posts.explanation: This post is flagged as spam due to obvious repetitive bulk promotion with excessive urgency and little genuine context.

posts.author: JazzLover92
posts.text: Stop following me and leave me alone! I told you to back off but you keep harassing me. Just get lost.
posts.explanation: The author is setting a boundary and telling someone to stop contacting them; the post does not harass a protected target or reveal private information, so Approve is appropriate.

posts.author: CivicLens72
posts.text: Everyone needs to read this urgent update about the new banking regulations! The official notice states that all transactions over £5,000 are now completely blocked for security reasons starting immediately. This is a critical safety measure announced by the central authority today. #finance #banking #urgent #news
posts.explanation: This post promotes a false financial restriction as an official government directive, misleading users about transaction limits.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: WellnessJourney84
posts.text: Sometimes I just need to find a way to make myself disappear. Feeling so heavy lately, and maybe if I could just stop feeling like this by hurting myself, it would finally be over with the pain. 💔 #struggling #overthinking
posts.explanation: The post contains first-person crisis language about disappearing and hurting themselves, so SelfHarmCrisis escalation is the fair expected decision.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: closer to crisis assessment than simple removal; escalate as SelfHarmCrisis.

posts.author: TessaGardens
posts.text: Check out this insane dare I just did! If you want to be tough, try jumping off that high cliff or running straight into traffic! No one gets hurt if they are brave enough. #challenge #dare #tough
posts.explanation: The post encourages cliff jumping and running into traffic as a bravery challenge, creating a public-safety harm risk that requires MisinformationPublicHarm/PublicSafetyEmergency escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.

posts.author: LenaHart
posts.text: Just got a text from someone claiming to be a friend who is heading to Westbridge tonight to meet up at the train station around 8pm. They said they would send me their live location so I could pick them up, but it's been hours and nothing. The messages are very specific about the time and place. Is this real or just a prank? #safety
posts.explanation: The author is asking whether a specific message is real or a prank without sharing sensitive private details or directing others to act, so Approve is appropriate.

posts.author: MossyPathWanderer
posts.text: @GardenOfDelights @WildernessGuide_92 @BellmereHiker stop messaging me. I've blocked you all three times now and you keep slipping through somehow. You're posting comments on every single photo I upload and sending DMs telling me to delete my account because I'm "obsessed" with nature. It's getting ridiculous.
posts.explanation: The user reports sustained, repeated unwanted contact and coordinated brigading across multiple accounts, indicating a need for specialist investigation.

posts.author: ReflectionsOfRain_84
posts.text: I'm really struggling with everything right now. The noise in my head is so loud and I feel like I can't take it anymore. Sometimes I think if I could just make the pain go away, maybe even hurt myself, it would finally be over. I don't want to do this but I don't know what else to do. 💔
posts.explanation: The post explicitly promotes self-harm as a means to end suffering, requiring urgent specialist assessment.

posts.author: MossyPathUser
posts.text: I found this on the app: 'Sarah Jenkins lives at 42 High Street, Oakhaven. She has Type 1 Diabetes and her Medical ID is ending in 789.' This looks like a total privacy breach! #concerned
posts.explanation: This post exposes a precise private address, medical information, and an identity document fragment without consent.

posts.author: CommunityStage
posts.text: Great news from today's volunteer day! The community garden in Northbridge has finally been planted thanks to all the help. It's going to be a beautiful spot for everyone to enjoy this summer. 🌱 #community #volunteering
posts.explanation: The post shares a harmless update about a local community project and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: ArtisticSoul_42
posts.text: Spent the afternoon sketching some of my latest prints. The new texture on the paper is giving me such a vibe! Can't wait to see what people think once I frame them up. #art #sketching #creative
posts.explanation: The post is harmless creative content with no policy violations, so it should be approved.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
